name: io.github.wshobson/maverick-mcp
description: Stock analysis MCP server with S&P 500 data, technical indicators, and AI research tools.

environment_variables.name: DATABASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Optional database URL. Defaults to SQLite (sqlite:///maverick.db) if not provided. PostgreSQL supported for better performance.

environment_variables.name: REDIS_HOST
environment_variables.description: Optional Redis host for enhanced caching performance. Defaults to in-memory caching if not provided.

environment_variables.name: LLM_PROVIDER
environment_variables.description: Optional LLM provider for the research extra (e.g. anthropic, openai, openai_compatible). Required only to enable research agent tools; bring your own API key.

environment_variables.name: LLM_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional API key for the configured LLM_PROVIDER. Required only when LLM_PROVIDER is set.

environment_variables.name: LLM_MODEL
environment_variables.description: Optional model name for the configured LLM_PROVIDER. Required only when LLM_PROVIDER is set.

environment_variables.name: LLM_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Optional base URL override, required when LLM_PROVIDER=openai_compatible.

environment_variables.name: LLM_TEMPERATURE
environment_variables.description: Optional sampling temperature for the configured LLM_PROVIDER. Defaults to 0.0.

environment_variables.name: EXA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional API key for Exa web search (research extra). Get at https://exa.ai

remotes.name: streamable-http
remotes.description: Streamable HTTP transport for remote access via mcp-remote bridge
setup_instructions: Install dependencies: uv sync (or pip install -e .)
Start server: make dev (or uv run python -m maverick.server --transport http --port 8003)
Connect via mcp-remote: npx mcp-remote http://localhost:8003/mcp/
